calendar.matters:
Motion To Add Deft'S Alias And Non Debtor'S Spouse Name To Abstract Of Judgmnt
Off Calendar Jul-10-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
Dave Marcolini, Esq., 415-568-0742 dvmresults@gmail.com Specially appearing for Bret Yaple, Esq. attorney for Plaintiff TK CREDIT RECOVERY, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION
No Other Apeparances.

Matter is not argued. Not contested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

ASSIGNEE TK CREDIT RECOVERY's Motion To Add Defendant'S Alias And Non Debtor'S Spouse Name To Abstract Of Judgment.

TK Credit Recovery's unopposed "motion to add defendant's alias and non-debtors spouse's name to abstract of judgment" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
